title: Phase 017 Review-Findings Remediation
description: Remediation charter for 27 consolidated tasks closing the Phase 017 review backlog across four waves. The headline fix is H-56-1: the canonical `/memory:save` path had been a deterministic metadata-freshness no-op because of a dead-code guard, a full-auto-only graph refresh gate, and the default plan-only execution mode; the packet also closes the code-graph readiness asymmetry, the Copilot compact-cache observability gap, the session-resume auth binding work, and the deferred maintainability follow-ups that Phase 018 depends on for traceable recovery and rollout hygiene.
